drafts.title: Why most onboarding flows fail at the first screen
drafts.preview: Acme Corp rebuilt their onboarding around one question: what does the user need to believe before they'll keep going? The answer wasn't more features — it was fewer decisions. Here's the three-step teardown we used.

drafts.title: The clarity tax: what vague copy actually costs
drafts.preview: Every confusing sentence on your landing page is a tax. Users pay it in attention, you pay it in conversions. A thread on the hidden cost of clever copy (and how to find it on your own site in 10 minutes).

drafts.title: Before/after: a SaaS hero section rewrite
drafts.preview: Same product. Same screenshot. One sentence changed — and the bounce rate dropped 22%. Swipe to see the rewrite and the reasoning behind every word.

drafts.title: Northwind just made a bold pricing bet
drafts.preview: Northwind killed their Starter tier this week. No more $0 entry point — they're betting the whole funnel on a single $99 plan. It's a clarity play, and I think it's the right call. Here's why simplifying your pricing can grow revenue.

drafts.title: 5 brand-voice mistakes I see in every founder deck
drafts.preview: I've reviewed 40+ founder decks this year. The same five voice mistakes show up every time — and they all make a strong product sound generic. Thread.
